goal: Add phase transition docs, improve graph failure alerting, and update stale ROADMAP/PROJECT docs

tasks.name: Add phase transition state machine documentation
microSteps: Add compact Phase Transitions subsection under Memory Engine
Document valid phases and forward-only rule

tdd.reason: Documentation addition validated by workflow_validate token budgets

tasks.action: In .claude/CLAUDE.md, add a 'Phase Transitions' subsection under Memory Engine. Content: 'Phases: discuss → plan → implement → review → ship (forward-only, advisory). Use phase-get/phase-set commands. Backward transitions emit stderr warnings.' Keep to 2-3 lines to stay within token budget.

tasks.name: Improve graph failure alerting in hooks
microSteps: In post_commit_graph() exception handler, distinguish ImportError from other errors
Add actionable setup instructions for ImportError
Add structured warning format for other errors

tdd.reason: Error reporting improvement; no behavior change for successful graph operations

tasks.action: In workflow_hooks.py post_commit_graph(), replace the single except handler with two: (1) except ImportError: print setup instructions pointing to .cnogo/requirements-graph.txt, (2) except Exception as exc: print structured warning with exception type and suggestion to check graph DB. Both return 0 (never block).

tasks.name: Update ROADMAP and PROJECT staleness
microSteps: Add workflow-deepdive-v2 as current in-progress work

tdd.reason: Documentation update with no code changes

tasks.action: Update ROADMAP.md: mark workflow-audit-fixes as completed, add workflow-deepdive-v2 as in-progress under current milestone. Update PROJECT.md: ensure project description and current status reflect actual state. Remove any references to completed or abandoned features that are no longer relevant.

commitMessage: docs(workflow): add phase transition docs, graph alerting, update ROADMAP/PROJECT
